item.title: Privacy Policy
item.dc:creator: 313562pwpadmin
item.content:encoded:
Privacy Policy

Last Updated: October 7, 2025

Effective Date: October 7, 2025

RainMaker ("we," "us," or "our") operates the RainMaker platform at archematch.com and rainmakerapp.io. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our service.

Important: By using RainMaker, you consent to the data practices described in this policy. If you do not agree with this policy, please do not use our service.

1. Information We Collect

1.1 Information You Provide Directly

  • Account Information: Name, email address, phone number, and professional details
  • Profile Information: Job title, company, industry, and professional biography
  • Communication Data: Messages, notes, and correspondence within the platform
  • Payment Information: Billing details processed securely through third-party payment processors

1.2 Information from LinkedIn Integration

When you connect your LinkedIn account, we collect:

  • Basic Profile Data: Name, profile picture, headline, and email address
  • Professional Information: Current position, work history, and education
  • Network Data: Your connections and their publicly available information
  • Activity Data: Posts, comments, and engagement (with your explicit permission)

LinkedIn Data Usage: We use LinkedIn's official OAuth 2.0 API and comply with all LinkedIn Platform Terms. You can revoke access at any time through your LinkedIn account settings.

1.3 Automatically Collected Information

  • Usage Data: Features used, time spent, clicks, and navigation patterns
  • Device Information: Browser type, operating system, IP address, and device identifiers
  • Cookies and Tracking: Session cookies, preference cookies, and analytics cookies

2. How We Use Your Information

2.1 Core Service Functionality

  • Analyze your social network to identify potential prospects
  • Generate psychological compatibility scores using Jungian personality frameworks
  • Provide AI-powered research on prospects using third-party services (Perplexity AI)
  • Create personalized outreach recommendations based on personality profiles
  • Identify warm introduction opportunities through mutual connections

2.2 Platform Improvement

  • Improve AI algorithms and psychological matching accuracy
  • Analyze usage patterns to enhance user experience
  • Develop new features based on user behavior and feedback
  • Conduct research and development on psychological intelligence systems

2.3 Communication

  • Send service updates, security alerts, and technical notices
  • Provide customer support and respond to inquiries
  • Send marketing communications (with your consent, opt-out available)

3. How We Share Your Information

3.1 Third-Party Service Providers

We share data with trusted partners who assist in operating our service:

  • LinkedIn: For authentication and accessing your professional network data
  • Perplexity AI: For conducting professional research on prospects
  • Cloud Infrastructure: AWS, Google Cloud, or similar hosting providers
  • Payment Processors: Stripe or similar services for billing
  • Analytics Providers: For usage analysis and platform improvement

3.2 Legal Requirements

We may disclose information when required by law, including:

  • Compliance with legal obligations, court orders, or subpoenas
  • Protection of our rights, property, or safety
  • Investigation of potential violations of our Terms of Service
  • Prevention of fraud or illegal activities

3.3 Business Transfers

In the event of a merger, acquisition, or sale of assets, your information may be transferred to the acquiring entity.

3.4 We Do NOT Sell Your Data

Important: We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal information to third parties for their marketing purposes.

4. Data Security

We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your information:

  • Encryption: SSL/TLS encryption for data in transit, AES-256 encryption for data at rest
  • Access Controls: Role-based access with multi-factor authentication
  • Regular Audits: Security assessments and vulnerability testing
  • Secure Infrastructure: SOC 2 compliant hosting providers
  • Employee Training: Regular security awareness training for all team members

However, no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure. We cannot guarantee absolute security of your data.

5. Your Privacy Rights

5.1 Access and Control

You have the right to:

  • Access: Request a copy of your personal data
  • Correction: Update or correct inaccurate information
  • Deletion: Request deletion of your account and data
  • Portability: Export your data in a machine-readable format
  • Objection: Object to certain data processing activities

5.2 LinkedIn Integration Control

  • Disconnect LinkedIn at any time from your RainMaker settings
  • Revoke access through LinkedIn's account settings
  • Control what data LinkedIn shares with RainMaker

5.3 Communication Preferences

  • Opt out of marketing emails via unsubscribe links
  • Manage notification preferences in your account settings
  • Note: Service-related communications cannot be opted out of

6. Data Retention

We retain your information for as long as necessary to:

  • Provide our services and maintain your account
  • Comply with legal obligations (typically 7 years for financial records)
  • Resolve disputes and enforce our agreements
  • Improve our services through aggregated, anonymized data

After account deletion, we retain minimal data for legal compliance and fraud prevention. Anonymized data may be retained indefinitely for research and development.

7. Cookies and Tracking Technologies

7.1 Types of Cookies We Use

  • Essential Cookies: Required for basic platform functionality
  • Preference Cookies: Remember your settings and preferences
  • Analytics Cookies: Help us understand how you use the platform
  • Marketing Cookies: Track effectiveness of advertising (with consent)

7.2 Managing Cookies

You can control cookies through your browser settings. Note that disabling certain cookies may limit platform functionality.

8. Children's Privacy

RainMaker is not intended for users under 18 years of age. We do not knowingly collect information from children. If we discover we have collected data from a child, we will delete it immediately.

9. International Data Transfers

Your information may be transferred to and processed in countries other than your country of residence. We ensure appropriate safeguards are in place, including:

  • Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) approved by the European Commission
  • Privacy Shield Framework compliance (where applicable)
  • Data Processing Agreements with all service providers

10. California Privacy Rights (CCPA)

If you are a California resident, you have additional rights:

  • Right to know what personal information is collected
  • Right to know if personal information is sold or disclosed
  • Right to opt-out of sale of personal information (we do not sell data)
  • Right to deletion of personal information
  • Right to non-discrimination for exercising privacy rights

11. European Privacy Rights (GDPR)

If you are in the European Economic Area, you have rights under GDPR:

  • Legal basis for processing: Consent, contract performance, legitimate interests
  • Right to withdraw consent at any time
  • Right to lodge a complaint with supervisory authority
  • Right to restrict processing in certain circumstances

12. Changes to This Privacy Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy periodically. We will notify you of material changes by:

  • Email notification to your registered email address
  • Prominent notice on the platform
  • Updating the "Last Updated" date at the top of this policy

Continued use of RainMaker after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

13. Contact Us

If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or wish to exercise your privacy rights, please contact us:

Email: privacy@rainmakerapp.io

Support: support@rainmakerapp.io

Response Time: We will respond to privacy requests within 30 days.

14. Third-Party Links

Our platform may contain links to third-party websites. We are not responsible for the privacy practices of these external sites. We encourage you to review their privacy policies.

15. Specific Service Disclosures

15.1 Psychological Profiling

Our psychological compatibility scoring system uses publicly available information and AI analysis to infer personality traits. These profiles are estimates and should not be used as definitive psychological assessments.

15.2 AI-Powered Research

We use third-party AI services (Perplexity AI) to research prospects. This research is based on publicly available information and may not be completely accurate or current.

15.3 Network Analysis

Our "Gatherers" system analyzes your social network connections. We only access data you explicitly grant permission to access through LinkedIn's OAuth process.

© 2025 RainMaker. All rights reserved.

archematch.com | rainmakerapp.io

privacy@rainmakerapp.io

item.title: Archematch_IR
item.dc:creator: 313562pwpadmin
item.content:encoded:
The Opportunity Technology Demo Traction Team Pitch Deck Access Data Room
Seed Round Open: $1.8M

Where Psychology Meets Prosperity

Transforming wealth management through AI-powered psychological intelligence. We don't just improve prospecting—we reimagine it.

View Pitch Deck Access Data Room Watch Demo Research

The $6B Existential Crisis

The wealth management industry is facing a perfect storm.

97%

Failure Rate

Nearly all traditional prospecting attempts fail, leading to a 90% attrition rate for new advisors.

100k+

Advisor Shortage

Projected shortage by 2034 (McKinsey & Co. 2025). The workforce is retiring faster than it can be replaced.

$6B

Annual Loss

Wasted annually on failed outreach and marketing spend. The core model is broken.

The Solution: Psychological Intelligence

We use Jungian archetypes and AI-driven research to determine compatibility BEFORE outreach begins.

The Hunter Pathway

For advisors building from scratch. We use public data signals (job changes, funding rounds) combined with psychological profiling to identify high-compatibility prospects.

The Gatherer Pathway

For established advisors. We analyze client social networks to uncover warm referral opportunities that match the advisor's specific archetype.

Defensible Moat

132 patent claims filed. 35M+ personality combinations. 40+ years of domain expertise embedded in the algorithm.

Compatibility Score
94%
Match Type
High Synergy
Communication Style Direct / Analytical
"Recommended Approach: Focus on data-driven ROI. This prospect values efficiency over rapport building in early stages."
Live Demo

See RainMaker in Action

Proven Performance

10-15x
Effectiveness Improvement
40%
Response Rates
132
Patent Claims
$52M
Proj. Year 5 EBITDA

Leadership & Advisors

Decades of domain expertise combined with cutting-edge academic validation.

GS

Gary Sinderbrand

Founder & CEO

40+ years in financial services. Trained 12,000+ advisors at Merrill Lynch and UBS. Creator of BetterPath Training.

RG

Raghu Gopalakrishnan

Senior Technologist

Former CTO at Relovate. Enterprise-scale software architecture and extensive ML/AI experience.

Key Advisors

Dr. Jimmie Lenz

Duke University FinTech Director

25+ years capital markets, machine learning & blockchain expertise.

Dr. Stephen A. Martin

Jungian Analyst, Philemon Foundation

Academic validation for our 12-archetype personality system.

Ready to Review the Data?

Access our full financial model, pitch deck, and due diligence materials securely.

Enter Investor Data Room

© 2025 ArcheMatch Inc. dba RainMaker App. All rights reserved.

gary@archematch.com | Privacy Policy

item.title: White Paper
item.dc:creator: 313562pwpadmin
item.content:encoded:
The Psychology of Alignment | RainMakerApp White Paper

RainMakerApp Research

The Psychology of Alignment

How Jungian Archetypes Transform Professional Prospecting and Sales

A comprehensive white paper on leveraging psychological intelligence to achieve 10x improvements in prospecting effectiveness

What You'll Learn

The 12 Jungian Archetypes

Understanding personality types in professional relationships

Complementary Alignment Theory

Why optimal pairings are often different—not identical—archetypes

High-Affinity Pairings

Sage + Hero, Caregiver + Innocent, and other proven combinations

Practical Application Framework

Archetype identification, compatibility scoring, and adaptive communication

Proven Results

25-40% response rates vs. 2-3% industry standard

Based on Carl Jung's foundational research:

12

Archetypes

144

Compatibility Pairings

10x

Improvement

Download the White Paper

Enter your details to receive instant access

By downloading, you agree to receive occasional insights from RainMakerApp. Unsubscribe anytime.

You're All Set!

Your white paper is ready for download.

Download PDF Now

Want to see psychological intelligence in action?

Try RainMakerApp Free

About RainMakerApp

RainMakerApp is a patent-pending AI-powered psychological intelligence platform that helps financial advisors identify and connect with prospects who are psychologically predisposed to work with them. Built by advisors, for advisors.

Learn more at archematch.com →

© 2025 ArcheMatch Inc. (RainMakerApp). All rights reserved.

Patent Pending | Edwards, Colorado
